steps.title: Combine the two ideas
steps.content: The text introduces habitat navigation, then describes researchers teaching goldfish to drive a wheeled tank. The main idea should capture the surprising point that fish can navigate outside water when given mechanical assistance.

steps.title: Avoid overclaims
steps.content: Choice A says fish can navigate only in water, which the experiment contradicts. Choice B claims navigation depends directly on the animal's environment, which the example challenges. Choice C invents treats and many different tasks. The remaining choice captures fish navigating on land with help. The answer is D.
